project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 登出请求和本地清除的认证凭据、Cookie和UserDefaults数据
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户登出时，先调用MediaWiki API发送logout请求，然后清除Keychain中的用户名密码、所有HTTP Cookie、UserDefaults中的同步设置

flow_steps.code: public func logout(initiatedBy logoutInitiator: LogoutInitiator, authInstrument: InstrumentImpl?, completion: @escaping () -> Void = {})
flow_steps.details: 登出流程触发，由用户、应用或服务器发起

flow_steps.code:
func logout(loginSiteURL: URL, reattemptOn401Response: Bool = false, completion: @escaping (Error?) -> Void) {
    performTokenizedMediaWikiAPIPOST(to: loginSiteURL, with: ["action": "logout", "format": "json"], reattemptLoginOn401Response: reattemptOn401Response) { (result, response, error) in
flow_steps.details: 向MediaWiki API发送action=logout POST请求，使服务器端会话失效
从iOS Keychain中删除保存的用户名和密码
清空内存中的当前用户缓存字典
从HTTPCookieStorage中删除所有HTTP Cookie（包括centralauth_认证Cookie）
重置UserDefaults中的阅读列表同步提示标志

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 当API返回401未授权响应时，会话管理器自动触发重新认证或登出流程

flow_steps.details: 服务器返回401状态码后，根据设置决定尝试重新登录或直接清除认证状态

flow_steps.code:
private func reset() {
    KeychainCredentialsManager.shared.username = nil
    KeychainCredentialsManager.shared.password = nil
    currentUserCache = [:]
    session.removeAllCookies()
flow_steps.details: 取消认证状态，清除Keychain凭据、Cookie和缓存

    logEvent(category: .setting, label: .login, action: .logout)
flow_steps.details: 用户在设置页面点击登出时触发登出分析事件
登出事件通过EventPlatformClient提交到ios.login_action流，最终发送到https://intake-analytics.wikimedia.org/v1/events
